title: Tender Springy Fujian Clotted-Cream Paella
description: A rich and creamy paella dish from Fujian province in China, made with clotted cream, yeast, and a variety of vegetables.

ingredients.name: Fujian-style vegetable mix (such as bok choy, carrots, and scallions)

instructions: In a small bowl, combine the yeast, 1 tablespoon of warm water, and 1 tablespoon of sugar. Let it sit for 5 minutes, until the mixture becomes frothy.
In a large paella pan, heat the butter over medium heat. Add the Fujian-style vegetable mix and cook until it's tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the rice to the pan and stir to coat with the vegetables and butter.
Add the yeast mixture, saffron-infused clotted cream, furikake seasoning, salt, and black pepper to the pan. Stir to combine.
Transfer the pan to the preheated oven and bake for 15 minutes.
Remove the pan from the oven and add the maitake mushrooms. Stir to combine.
Return the pan to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes, until the rice is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
Remove the pan from the oven and stir in the sesame oil. Let it sit for 5 minutes before serving.
